briefs.title: Council to Consider: Solo Karaoke Ltd. Delegation Request in Burnaby
briefs.summary: Burnaby City Council is set to hear a delegation request from Solo Karaoke Ltd., meaning the business has asked for time to speak directly to Council. The outcome of this presentation could affect how solo karaoke businesses operate in Burnaby.
briefs.action_required: Watch for the Council decision — it could affect licensing or operating rules for karaoke businesses in Burnaby.

key_dates.label: Solo Karaoke Ltd. delegation heard by Burnaby City Council
